title: Surgeries – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
h1: Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
text_excerpt: Surgeries – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Home About News In Parliament Whitestone Solar Farm Newsletter Activity Surgeries Campaigns Contact Useful Contacts Facebook Twitter Surgeries I hold regular appointment advice surgeries at my office or online. If you would like to make an appointment please email me by clicking here . Street Surgeries I regularly have street surgeries across the constituency, where you can come and speak to me about your concerns. Upcoming Street Surgeries: Please get in touch to ask when our next street surgery will be near you What has Jake been up to in Rother Valley? You can see where Jake has done public events and street surgeries so far since being elected below: Map Key (Legend) Map Key Surgery Event / Visit OpenStreetMap with Leaflet – Rother Valley Boundary Filter by: Show All Street Surgeries Event / Visit Filter by Month: All Months Enable Clustering Facebook Twitter Jake Richards MP – Labour Member of Parliament for Rother Valley Copyright 2026 – Privacy Policy – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
